reasoning: The market baseline is around 5.15%, which likely reflects both the possibility of Trump winning the election and then officially appointing Musk to an administration role by the end of 2025. While Musk and Trump have been in communication, Musk generally prefers unofficial advisory positions to formal government appointments because a formal role could compel him to divest from his companies (Tesla, SpaceX, xAI, etc.) due to conflict-of-interest laws. Given these constraints, an official appointment seems highly unlikely.
